title: Sarcocolla formosa
taxonomy: Sarcocolla formosa belongs to the family Olacaceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Africa. Sarcocolla formosa is a shrub or small tree that grows in various habitats, including forests and woodlands. The plant is classified as a member of the order Santalales. This classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the order.
